shellCommands.command:
SERVER_PORT=3000 java -jar target/hello-world-api-1.0.0.jar &>/tmp/spring-boot.log &
echo $!
sleep 3
# Wait for it to be ready
for i in $(seq 1 10); do
  if curl -s http://localhost:3000/ >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "Server ready"
    break
  fi
  sleep 1
done

# Test 1: GET / (no name) - should return {"message":"Hello World!"}
echo "=== Test 1: GET / ==="
curl -s http://localhost:3000/ | python3 -m json.tool

# Test 2: GET /?name=Alice - should return {"message":"Hello Alice!"}
echo "=== Test 2: GET /?name=Alice ==="
curl -s "http://localhost:3000/?name=Alice" | python3 -m json.tool

# Test 3: GET /?name=+Bob+ - should trim and return {"message":"Hello Bob!"}
echo "=== Test 3: GET /?name=%20%20Bob%20%20 ==="
curl -s "http://localhost:3000/?name=%20%20Bob%20%20" | python3 -m json.tool

# Test 4: GET /?name= - empty name should return "Hello World!"
echo "=== Test 4: GET /?name= (empty) ==="
curl -s "http://localhost:3000/?name=" | python3 -m json.tool

# Test 5: Content-Type check
echo "=== Test 5: Content-Type ==="
curl -s -i http://localhost:3000/ | grep -i content-type
